body.title: Exclude WORD_GRAPH nodes from Phase 1 text search in cortex.py
body.result: added memory_type NOT IN _ALWAYS_EXCLUDE guard to all_memories filter before Phase 1 scoring; WORD_GRAPH (57K) nodes from traversal no longer enter candidate pool
body.intention: I intend that Phase 1 text search never scans WORD_GRAPH nodes.
body.description:
Expert audit (Data Engineer): the Phase 1 full-text search in cortex.search() runs across ALL memory types including the 57K WORD_GRAPH nodes. Word nodes whose narrative contains text will appear as Phase 1 candidates and must be filtered in Phase 2 — unnecessary work. Adding AND memory_type != 'WORD_GRAPH' to the Phase 1 WHERE clause prevents all 57K nodes from entering the candidate set.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/memory/cortex.py (Phase 1 search query)
**Design rules:** HIGH-inertia cortex.py — Akien pre-approval required
**Scope boundary:** IN — add memory_type exclusion to Phase 1 text search; OUT — other search phases, WORD_GRAPH access path via spread_word_graph()
**Completion criteria:** EXPLAIN ANALYZE on the Phase 1 query confirms WORD_GRAPH nodes are excluded from the scan; search quality test verifies relevant non-WORD_GRAPH results still appear
